welcome.title: Welcome to Starter
welcome.intro: Welcome to Starter! I'm Kais, one of the founders. It's really important to us that you have a great experience ramping up.
welcome.description: We're excited to help you build and grow your business. Our platform is designed to make running your business easier and more efficient.
welcome.support: If you have any questions or need assistance, don't hesitate to reach out to our support team.

otp.title: Your verification code
otp.intro: You requested a one-time password to sign in to your account.
otp.description: Enter the following code to complete your sign-in:
otp.expires: This code will expire in 10 minutes.
otp.not_requested: If you didn't request this code, you can safely ignore this email.

invitation.title: You're invited to join {organizationName}
invitation.intro: {inviter} has invited you to join {organizationName} as a {role}.
invitation.description: Click the button below to accept this invitation and get started. This invite was sent to {recipientEmail}.
invitation.fallback: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
invitation.not_you: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.
